title: Frigid
body:
{For testing only currently} A 1.19.3 winter zombie apocalypse mod pack with a variety of data packs, custom resource packs, and mods to help the experience. It includes [Winter Apocalypse++](https://modrinth.com/datapack/world-generator-winter-apocalypse!), [Manic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/manic), and [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails), and much more it has everything you could ever need to have a frigid Apocalypse experience.
Feedback


Mod List

Check out the projects I'm using! [Atlas Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/atlas-lib) [Better Animations Collection](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-animations-collection) [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) [Death Finder](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-finder) [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer) [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/from-the-fog) [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) [Just Enough Resources (JER)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer) [Kiwi 🥝](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiwi) [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader) [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) [Snow!
